title: What's in the Offing for CMS Energy (CMS) in Q1 Earnings?
text: CMS Energy's (CMS) first-quarter results are likely to reflect a mixed impact on its sales, buoyed by favorable new connections and load growth, offset by unfavorable warm weather conditions.

title: Consumers Energy Proposes Investment to Modernize Grid, Improve Customer Reliability and Lead Clean Energy Transformation
text: JACKSON, Mich. , April 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Consumers Energy proposed a $272 million investment in Michigan's energy future to support a more reliable, resilient, and increasingly clean energy system for its customers.

title: Analysts Estimate CMS Energy (CMS) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
text: CMS Energy (CMS) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Consumers Energy Offers New "Mi Clean Air" Program to Offset Natural Gas Carbon Emissions
text: Customers can reduce environmental impact from heating homes, businesses JACKSON, Mich. , April 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Consumers Energy has kicked off a new program for residential and business customers who want to offset carbon emissions from their natural gas use and help protect the planet's atmosphere.

title: Consumers Energy Foundation Provides $500,000 to Three Projects Protecting Michigan's Environment
text: Planet Awards Support Projects in Southeast Michigan and Kalamazoo Area   JACKSON, Mich. , April 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Consumers Energy Foundation celebrated Earth Month today by providing $500,000 for three projects that will make a significant impact on Michigan's environment – preserving freshwater resources, planting 1,000 trees and protecting habitat for Michigan's wildlife.

title: Consumers Energy and Key Stakeholders Reach Landmark Agreement to Create Cleaner Energy Future for Michigan
text: JACKSON, Mich. , April 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Consumers Energy and key stakeholders throughout Michigan have agreed on a settlement related to the company's Clean Energy Plan, a sweeping proposal to stop using coal as a fuel source for electric generation by 2025, making the company one of the first in the nation to go coal-free.

title: CMS Energy to Announce 2022 First Quarter Results on May 3
text: JACKSON, Mich. , April 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- CMS Energy announced today it will provide 2022 first quarter results along with a business and financial outlook at 9:00 a.m.
